name: @i-language/mem-forever
description_en: Every AI tool forgets you. This one doesn't. Ever. Persistent memory across sessions and tools. Auto-generates profile, saves decisions and lessons to .ilang/, applies preferences forever.
description_zh: 每个 AI 工具都会忘记您。而这个不会。永远不会。跨会话和工具的持久化记忆。自动生成配置文件，将决策和课程保存到 .ilang/，永久应用偏好设置。
